description: Half-open [start, end) interval semantics on a normal Tuesday (2025-08-26, PDT). Every period owns its start instant but not its end, so each boundary instant belongs to exactly one interval. Period 1 15:30-16:28Z, Period 2 16:34-17:37Z, Period 3 17:43-18:41Z, Lunch 18:41-19:21Z (back-to-back with Period 3), ... Period 6 21:35-22:33Z (last). All these instants returned null before period starts were made inclusive.
